decisions.decision: ACCEPT. The R3 repair and truthful route-delivery state satisfy the independent R0 Exit QA review.

R0_GATE=PASS is a reasonable and evidence-backed recovery-baseline conclusion. R0 establishes trustworthy repository, coordination, ledger, roadmap, and runtime-gap evidence; it does not claim R1 product runtime completion.
Normal Web/Electron authoritative Worker command/query/save/load/time-control wiring remains an explicit R1 R4 risk. It is not hidden, and its absence is not misused as an R0 baseline failure.
Lead recorded delivery only after the real send_input event. 10e6e188 preserves pending state; 9b5ea465 records the exact real submission and timestamp.
No product code, package, dependency, content, CI, historical Gate, R1 implementation, push, PR, agent spawn, or unrelated scope drift was found.

risks.summary: Normal Web/Electron paths still lack authoritative Worker command/query/save/load/time-control wiring. R1 must close this gap with real production adapters and integration tests.
The protected M7 renderer worktree retains exactly 20 pre-existing status entries and remains outside operational R0 work.
The production/fixture/no-op matrix is static evidence. R1 must add real Worker, command, query, save/load/restart, time-control, and negative integration tests.

requested_action: Record this QA ACCEPT and run the final Lead integration gates, PR, and CI. Close R0 only after accepted evidence reaches origin/main and final integration checks pass. Keep R1 frozen and do not start or create the R1 task graph until R0 closure is complete.
